calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant BT Transporation, Inc. aka BT Transportation Inc

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:36:56 a.m. and concluding at 10:16:45 a.m. (D505).

Anna Landa, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.via Zoom Video Conference.
Tiffanie Brown, Esq. supervisory counsel for plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.
Benjamin Seeman, witness sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant BT Transporation, Inc. aka BT Transportation Inc not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for open book account, et al filed Nov-28-2023.
Proof of mail and acknowledgment of receipt of service filed Apr-08-2024.
Default entered as to Defendant BT Transporation, Inc. aka BT Transportation Inc on Apr-15-2024
Notice of Default hearing filed Jun-26-2024.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1 to 10 on Jun-26-2024

Counsel summarizes the case, offer proof as to witness testimony and prayer.
Counsel offers proof as to attorney's fees.
The Court examines the witness. Witness testifies.
The Court denies prejudgment interest requested at 18% pursuant to CCP 3289. Prejudgment interest charged is at 10%.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:
The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:
Damages $29,756.40
Interest $3,309.22
Costs $515.98
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Total Judgment $36,406.60
Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Continued To Nov-06-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Continued To Jul-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
